chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Misc. Appln. No. 507 of 2022 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1 For orders on office objection at “A” 2. For hearing of Case 05.06.2025 Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Addl. APG Mr. Sardar Khan, APG ************* None present for the applicant. Learned Addl.PG has drawn attention towards the impugned order whereby the report was filed under “A” class and same was also approved by the Court therefore no illegality has been committed by the trial Court. The order sheet reflects that the applicant and his counsel have remained absent and on the last date of hearing, no one was present on behalf of the applicant. It seems that applicant and his counsel have lost their interest to proceed with the instant matter, same is dismissed in non- prosecution. J U D G E brohips
